meaning: n.手提式扩音器 (美)手提式扩音器
examples: Then Chantal Kenol, a director, raised a bullhorn.
Now, in the crowded stairwell, Rescorla sang into the bullhorn.
While everyone was panicking, Lanni took up a bullhorn and calmly talked the man down.
But last spring, they became a bullhorn in the Arab world, and a lifeline in Japan.
